title: bilabrella strangulans
side_effects: Bilabrella strangulans can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Ingesting the plant's extract can lead to gastrointestinal issues, such as nausea, vomiting, and stomach cramps. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxins can also cause neurological problems, including headaches, dizziness, and even seizures in extreme cases. If not handled correctly, the plant's volatile compounds can irritate the skin and eyes, causing redness, swelling, and blurred vision.
